summary: [APU Health Monitor] Create query for APU Health Monitor in Engine Folder

output_fields.name: psn
output_fields.description: Unique PSN associated with each APU Serial Number

output_fields.name: ref_date
output_fields.description: Reference Date (latest date only for each APU)

transformations: Join rotables table to rotables_trend table on PSN field
Join rotables table to aircraft table on aircraft registration to obtain aircraft type
Filter rotables_trend to retain only the latest reference date for each unique PSN/APU combination
Retain only records where trend_type equals CT5
acceptance_criteria: Query returns all APUs fitted to B737NG aircraft in AMOS Acceptance database
Only the latest reference date is included for each APU
All required fields are present in output: APU P/n, APU S/n, PSN, Aircraft Reg., Reference Date, CT5, Workorder, CT5ATP value, and Aircraft Type
VDS is created in Engine Folder
Query can be switched to AMOS Production when system goes live
No null values in critical fields (partno, serialno, psn, ac_registr, ac_typ)
